descriptions.value: A pessimist is one who builds dungeons in the air.
Though the dungeon, the scourge, and the executioner be absent, the guilty mind can apply the goad and scorch with blows.
We are all serving a life sentence in the dungeon of the self.
I had rather be a toad, and live upon the vapor of a dungeon than keep a corner in the thing I love for others uses.
Long lost civilization...
The mountains of Nepal are harsh...
The desserts of Egypt are unforgiving...
Creepy place...
The depths of the Mayan ruins run for miles deep underground...

Known as a Saint of Gribblekind, this matriarch led the last and finest generation of Gribbles from their homeland to the Promised Land, far away from the scourge of the Brown Rains. She and her brood were pilgrims sailing dark seas in search of Paradise. When most lost hope, she was always there to brighten their spirits, or banish them to be devoured by the Shipwurm so they would not bring everyone down.

descriptions.name: The Mother Mass
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: There’s something wrong with Oma and Opa, but they’ve always been there to help Johnny and his siblings, tuck them in at night, feed them porridge, and even regale them with tales of their homeland. The smell of their putrefying flesh has always been a comfort to the little ones, because they know Oma and Opa are always waiting in the darkness, watching over them.

descriptions.name: False Grandparents
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: Little baby Edward loves to eat his Gribbles. He loves the way they squirm when he gums their little bodies to pieces. Sweet little Edward has a power inside him that boils within, waiting to froth over into our realm. The eating stifles that hatred, and keeps the darkness at bay. One day, Edward must become a monster, and the joys of eating will be lost on him. For now he enjoys his meals very much.

descriptions.name: Baby Edward
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: Twenty Years on the eve of the Great Dumping, a chosen one will don the symbol of the order and bring singularity to a troubled land. If it is his doing that saves us, then the greatest efforts of humanity have fallen to the Brown Rains, and the Fecal Lord has indeed come. The Filthy One will liquefy the hopes of humankind into a dark, putrid sea of nightmares. The Stagman must come of the earth, a warrior of equalization and fire, to burn away the septic horrors of the Shizamann.

descriptions.name: The Stagman
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: A devoted wife, and loving mother, Barbara has always had her eye set on the big stage. The silver screen calls her name, and she'll do anything it takes to be a shining star.

descriptions.name: Dearest Barbara
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: An agent of filth, the Shizamann comes to bring peace and malaise to the world. A Bringer of the Brown Rains, he comes from the nether to devour unstable worlds, and bring bleak, brown smiles to all those who once suffered, and all those who once rejoiced. Everyone will dance slow, their bodies intertwined together in the filth and squalor, and grin as the Fecal Lord floats above them, raining malfeasance onto them. The world will become still, and the seas stagnant, and all will swim in the bogs of unity.

descriptions.name: The Shizamann
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: Sometimes, the world finds itself with one too many children. Some days, little cataclysms are born into the corporeal where they do not belong yet, or ever. They need none other than a humble clown to emerge and take them away, back to the incorporeal. It is said that these keepers of the Old Ways will come from a dense fog, and steal back ill-gotten flesh from souls who are not worthy, or have not yet waited their time to return to the world. The Clowns are always watching, always waiting to do what must be done for life itself to be.

descriptions.name: Carthage, the Clown
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.value: With his kind being subjugated and devoured, High Overknight Griven has always fought for the freedom of his people. His descent showed him the way. Devoured and defecated into the darkness, his soul was twisted, and the truth of what he must do was made clear.

descriptions.name: Griven's Fall
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

descriptions.name: Mr. 27B
descriptions.type: A Dump in the Dark Trading Card

The yawning maw of the cavern claws into your very soul.

A place of great sorrow...and an even greater evil.
